narrative:
Precinct Portsmouth 6-A (precinct in Scioto County) has 424 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.9%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.7 percentage points.
